questionHtml:
Two copper wires of equal lengths but different diameters are used to connect a cell to a load. Wire 1 has a diameter M, wire 2 has a diameter 2M. The electron drift velocities in wires 1 and 2 are v1 and v2.

What is v2v1?


A.  4

B.  2

C.  12

D.  14
